title: potentilla reptans subsp. mixta
intro: Potentilla reptans subsp. mixta, also known as cinquefoil, is a perennial herb belonging to the rose family and native to Europe. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of Potentilla reptans subsp. mixta include reducing fever, alleviating menstrual cramps, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine.
